title: Obsidian Paxel
description: A rudimentary mod which adds a Multi-tool made out of Obsidian, that's it.
body:
This mod just adds a Multi-tool made out of obsidian.

The Paxel functions like a Pickaxe, Axe and Shovel, in one item. The Paxel is an Iron tier tool, can be repaired with Obsidian, has Mining Speed and Durability inbetween Iron and Diamond & very low enchantability.

An important thing to note is that the Paxel only features the Mining aspects of the Tools, it can't strip logs or make path blocks. This was mostly due to me not being super experienced with java + I don't want any of those tool types to be overshadowed by the item.

Here's a quick showcase video of the Paxel:

I have no intentions on porting this to any future version or any other mod loader, no you aren't allowed to do it either.
